questions.question: 已知 $P(A)=0.8, P(\bar{B})=0.3, P(A \cup B)=0.9$, 则 $P(B \mid A)=()$.
questions.ai_tags: 条件概率,概率加法公式

questions.question: 设 $A, B$ 为随机事件, $P(A)=0.7, P(B)=0.5, P(A-B)=0.3$, 则 $P(A B)=() ; P(B-A)=() ; P(\bar{B} \mid \bar{A})=()$.
questions.analysis:
$$
\begin{aligned}
& P(A B)=P(A)-P(A \bar{B})=P(A)-P(A-B)=0.7-0.3=0.4, \\
& \quad P(B-A)=P(B)-P(A B)=0.5-0.4=0.1, \\
& \quad P(\bar{B} \mid \bar{A})=\frac{P(\bar{A} \cap \bar{B})}{P(\bar{A})}=\frac{P(\overline{A \cup B})}{P(\bar{A})}=\frac{1-[P(A)+P(B)-P(A B)]}{1-P(A)}=\frac{2}{3} .
\end{aligned}
$$

注意: $A-B=A \bar{B}=A-A B$.
questions.ai_tags: 随机事件,条件概率,概率计算

questions.question: 设 $A \subset B, P(A)=0.1, P(B)=0.5$, 则 $P(\bar{A} \cup \bar{B})+P(A \mid B)-P(A B)=()$.
questions.analysis:
因为 $A \subset B$, 所以 $A B=A, A \cup B, \bar{A} \cup \bar{B}=\overline{A B}$, 故
$$
\begin{gathered}
P(A B)=P(A)=0.1, \quad P(A \mid B)=\frac{P(B A)}{P(B)}=0.2, \\
P(\bar{A} \cup \bar{B})=P(\overline{A B})=1-P(A B)=0.9,
\end{gathered}
$$

所以 $P(\bar{A} \cup \bar{B})+P(A \mid B)-P(A B)=1.0$.
questions.ai_tags: 概率的基本性质,条件概率

questions.question: 设随机事件 $A$ 与 $B$ 互不相容, 已知 $P(A)=P(B)=a(0<a<1), P(A \mid \bar{B})=P(\bar{A} \mid \bar{B})$, 则 $a, P(A \cup B)$ 的值分别为 ( ).
questions.analysis:
(1) 由 $P(A \mid \bar{B})+P(\bar{A} \mid \bar{B})=1$, 有 $P(A \mid \bar{B})=P(\bar{A} \mid \bar{B})=0.5$, 再根据 $A, B$ 互不相容,
$$
P(A \mid \bar{B})=\frac{P(A \bar{B})}{P(\bar{B})}=\frac{P(A)}{1-P(B)}=\frac{a}{1-a}=0.5,
$$

解出 $a=\frac{1}{3}$;
(2) $P(A \cup B)=P(A)+P(B)=\frac{2}{3}$.
questions.ai_tags: 概率论,条件概率,互不相容事件

questions.question: 已知 $P(A)=\frac{1}{2}, P(B)=\frac{2}{5}, P(B \mid A)=\frac{2}{3}$, 则 $P(A \cup B)=()$.
questions.analysis: 根据乘法公式 $P(A B)=P(A) P(B \mid A)=\frac{1}{2} \times \frac{2}{3}=\frac{1}{3}$, 所以 $P(A \cup B)=P(A)+P(B)-P(A B)=\frac{1}{2}+\frac{2}{5}-\frac{1}{3}=\frac{17}{30}$.
questions.ai_tags: 概率论,加法公式,乘法公式

questions.question: 已知 $P(A)=0.6, P(B)=0.5, P(A \mid B)=0.8$, 则 $P(A \cup B)=()$.
questions.analysis:
根据乘法公式有, $P(A B)=P(B) P(A \mid B)=0.5 \times 0.8=0.4$,
再根据概率的性质， $P(A \cup B)=P(A)+P(B)-P(A B)=0.6+0.5-0.4=0.7$.
questions.ai_tags: 概率论,概率加法公式,条件概率

questions.question: 设事件 $A$ 与 $B$ 互不相容, 且 $P(A)=\frac{1}{3}, P(B)=\frac{1}{4}$, 则条件概率 $P(A \mid \bar{B})=()$.
questions.analysis: 由于事件 $A$ 与 $B$ 互不相容, 则 $A B=\varnothing$, 所以 $A \bar{B}=A$,则 $P(A \mid \bar{B})=\frac{P(A \bar{B})}{P(\bar{B})}=\frac{P(A)}{1-P(B)}=\frac{\frac{1}{3}}{1-\frac{1}{4}}=\frac{4}{9}$.
questions.ai_tags: 条件概率,互不相容事件,概率计算

questions.question: 设 $A, B$ 为两事件, $P(A)=0.7, P(B)=0.6, P(B \mid \bar{A})=0.4$, 则 $P(A \cup B)=(\quad)$.
questions.ai_tags: 条件概率,概率加法公式

questions.question: 已知 $P(A)=\frac{1}{4}, P(B \mid A)=\frac{1}{2}, P(A \mid B)=\frac{1}{3}$, 则 $P(A \cup B)=()$.
questions.analysis:
由乘法公式得 $P(A B)=P(A) P(B \mid A)=\frac{1}{4} \cdot \frac{1}{2}=\frac{1}{8}$,
再由乘法公式的变形得 $P(B)=\frac{P(A B)}{P(A \mid B)}=\frac{\frac{1}{8}}{\frac{1}{3}}=\frac{3}{8}$,
所以 $P(A \cup B)=P(A)+P(B)-P(A B)=\frac{1}{4}+\frac{3}{8}-\frac{1}{8}=\frac{1}{2}$.
questions.ai_tags: 概率论,条件概率,加法公式

questions.question: 设 $A, B$ 是两个随机事件, $P(A)=0.4, P(A B)=0.2, P(A \mid B)+P(\bar{A} \mid \bar{B})=1$, 则 $P(A \cup B)=()$.
questions.analysis: 由 $P(A)=P(A B)+P(A \bar{B})=0.4, P(A B)=0.2$. 因此 $P(A \bar{B})=0.2$, 并且 $P(B)>0, P(\bar{B})>0$,对于 $\bar{B}$, 有 $P(A \mid \bar{B})+P(\bar{A} \mid \bar{B})=1$, 于是 $P(A \mid \bar{B})=P(A \mid B)$, 因此 $A$ 与 $B$ 相互独立, 有 $P(B)=\frac{P(A B)}{P(A)}=0.5$,所以 $P(A \cup B)=P(A)+P(B)-P(A B)=0.7$.
questions.ai_tags: 随机事件,条件概率,事件独立性

questions.question: 已知已知 $P(A)=\frac{1}{2}, P(B)=\frac{5}{8}, P(B \mid A)=\frac{3}{4}$. 则 $P(A \mid B)=()$.
questions.analysis: 根据乘法公式 $P(A B)=P(A) P(B \mid A)=\frac{1}{2} \times \frac{3}{4}=\frac{3}{8}$, 所以 $P(A \mid B)=\frac{P(A B)}{P(B)}=\frac{\frac{3}{8}}{\frac{5}{8}}=\frac{3}{5}$.

questions.question: 已知 $P(A)=\frac{1}{3}, P(B \mid A)=\frac{3}{5}, P(A \cup B)=\frac{3}{4}$. 则 $P(A \mid B)=()$.
questions.analysis:
由条件概率公式及条件 $P(B \mid A)=\frac{3}{5}, P(A B)=P(A) P(B \mid A)=\frac{1}{3} \times \frac{3}{5}=\frac{1}{5}$,又由概率性质 $P(A \cup B)=P(A)+P(B)-P(A B)$ 得,
$$
P(B)=P(A \cup B)+P(A B)-P(A)=\frac{3}{4}+\frac{1}{5}-\frac{1}{3}=\frac{37}{60},
$$

所以 $P(A \mid B)=\frac{P(A B)}{P(B)}=\frac{12}{37}$.
questions.ai_tags: 概率论,条件概率,加法公式

questions.question: 设 $A, B$ 为两个随机事件, $P(A)=0.5, P(A \bar{B})=0.4$, 则 $P(B \mid A)=()$.
questions.analysis: 由于 $P(A)=P(AB)+P(A\bar{B})$, 所以 $P(AB)=P(A)-P(A\bar{B})=0.5-0.4=0.1$, 由条件概率公式 $P(B \mid A)=\frac{P(AB)}{P(A)}=\frac{0.1}{0.5}=0.2$.

questions.question: 设 $P(A)=\alpha, P(B)=\beta, P(B \mid A)=\gamma$, 则 $P(A \mid B)=(\quad)$.
questions.analysis: 由乘法公式得 $P(A B)=P(B \mid A) P(A)=\alpha \gamma$,所以 $P(A \mid B)=\frac{P(A B)}{P(B)}=\frac{\alpha \gamma}{\beta}$.
questions.ai_tags: 概率论,条件概率,乘法公式

questions.question: 设 $A, B$ 为两事件, $P(A)=0.4, P(B)=0.8, P(\bar{A} B)=0.5$, 则 $P(B \mid A)=()$.
questions.analysis:
由于 $B=A B+\bar{A} B$, 所以 $P(A B)=P(B)-P(\bar{A} B)=0.8-0.5=0.3$, 根据条件概率公式
$$
P(B \mid A)=\frac{P(A B)}{P(A)}=\frac{0.3}{0.4}=0.75
$$
questions.ai_tags: 条件概率,概率的基本性质

questions.question: 设 $A_1, A_2, B$ 为三个随机事件, 且 $P(B)>0, A_1 \cap A_2=\varnothing$, 则 $P\left(\overline{A_1} \cup \overline{A_2} \mid B\right)=()$.
questions.analysis: $\begin{aligned} P(\overline{A_1} \cup \overline{A_2} \mid B) &= P(\overline{A_1 \cap A_2} \mid B) = 1 - P(A_1 \cap A_2 \mid B) \\ &= 1 - P(\varnothing \mid B) = 1 - \frac{P(\varnothing \cap B)}{P(B)} \\ &= 1 - \frac{P(\varnothing)}{P(B)} = 1. \end{aligned}$
questions.ai_tags: 条件概率,事件运算,概率性质

questions.question: 已知 $P(A \cup B)=0.8, P(B)=0.4$, 则 $P(A \mid \bar{B})=()$.
questions.analysis:
法1：
$$
0.8=P(A \cup B)=1-P(\overline{A \cup B})=1-P(\bar{A} \bar{B})=1-P(\bar{B}) P(\bar{A} \mid \bar{B})=1-0.6 P(\bar{A} \mid \bar{B})
$$
解得 $P(\bar{A} \mid \bar{B})=\frac{1}{3}$，又 $P(A \mid \bar{B})=1-P(\bar{A} \mid \bar{B})$，从而 $P(A \mid \bar{B})=\frac{2}{3}$。

法2：
$$P(A \mid \bar{B})=\frac{P(A \bar{B})}{P(\bar{B})}=\frac{P(A)-P(A B)}{P(\bar{B})}=\frac{P(A \cup B)-P(B)}{P(\bar{B})}=\frac{0.8-0.4}{1-0.4}=\frac{2}{3}$$
questions.ai_tags: 条件概率,概率加法公式

questions.question: 设 $A, B$ 为两事件，已知 $P(\bar{A})=0.3, P(B)=0.4, P(A-B)=0.5$，则 $P(B \mid A \cup \bar{B}) = (\quad)$.
